TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mawnicen == mawnicen sa, mauzip i teban atu satemulan nu Taywan subal, takalaw atudiay a buyubuyuan maka 900-2100m. caykamauzip i bukebukelalan. u dauc-landaway a kilang. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == mawni ¶…ôn == mawni ¶…ôn sa, mauzip i t…ôban atu sat…ômur~…ĺan nu tajwan subar~…ĺ, takar~…ĺaw atudiaj a bujubujuan maka ***-****m. ¶ajkamauzip i buk…ôbuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan. u dau ¶-r~…ĺandawaj a kir~…ĺaŇč. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: == mawnicen == mawnicen sa, mauzip i teban atu satemulan nu Taywan subal, takalaw atudiay a buyubuyuan maka 900-2100m. caykamauzip i bukebukelalan. u dauc-landaway a kilang. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == mawni ¶…ôn == mawni ¶…ôn sa, mauzip i t…ôban atu sat…ômur~…ĺan nu tajwan subar~…ĺ, takar~…ĺaw atudiaj a bujubujuan maka ***-****m. ¶ajkamauzip i buk…ôbuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan. u dau ¶-r~…ĺandawaj a kir~…ĺaŇč. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
